entity.summary: Early automated market maker and decentralized liquidity protocol. HEI treats Bancor as one protocol-level DEX entity rather than separate records for each version row.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0182 through hei_unadded_0186 as one entity to avoid duplicate Bancor version records.

events.title: Bancor protocol launch treated as DEX start
events.description: Bancor is recorded as an early Ethereum ecosystem AMM and decentralized liquidity protocol. Version rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
events.notes: Launch date uses the public Bancor token generation / protocol launch period and should be refined if a stronger primary source is added.

evidence.title: Bancor official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify current Bancor identity.

evidence.title: Bancor documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation used for protocol-level identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko / CoinPaprika / DefiLlama references for Bancor variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0182-0186 contained Bancor deployment/version references.
